name: Arm X: Charge Token Type
official_rules_text: A unit that is equipped with a card that has the Arm X: Charge Token Type keyword can make the Arm X action. When a unit makes the Arm X action, the unit places X Charge tokens (Advantage) of the speci/f_ied type and matching its controlling player’s color completely within 1 and LOS of its unit leader. Charge tokens cannot overlap any Objective, Advantage, or other Charge tokens and must be placed on a flat surface.
